# paymentapi — prod — service catalog

Generated by `service-discovery` skill. Source repo: `paymentapi-infra`.

---

## Overview

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Service | paymentapi |
| Environment | prod |
| Region | ap-southeast-1 |
| Account | 123456789012 |
| Runtime | ECS Fargate (app tier) + RDS PostgreSQL 15 (data tier) |
| IaC tooling | Terraform |
| On-call | #payments-oncall (PagerDuty) |

## Resource inventory

| Resource type | Name / identifier | Notes |
|---------------|-------------------|-------|
| `aws_db_instance` | `paymentapi-db-prod` | Multi-AZ, gp3 100GB, encrypted |
| `aws_db_parameter_group` | `paymentapi-prod-*` | postgres15 family, `max_connections=100` |
| `aws_security_group` (db) | `paymentapi-db-prod-*` | Port 5432, ingress from app SG only |
| `aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm` | `paymentapi-db-cpu-high-prod` | Threshold 80% CPU |
| `aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm` | `paymentapi-db-connections-high-prod` | Threshold 80 connections |

## Naming pattern

`paymentapi-{role}-{env}` — role describes the resource function (db, svc, tg, alerts, etc.).

## Dependency graph

**Upstream (paymentapi depends on):**
- VPC `vpc-0abc123def456` and private subnets
- DB subnet group `paymentapi-prod-db-subnet-group`
- SNS topic `paymentapi-alerts-prod` (owned by app-tier Terraform)

**Downstream (depends on paymentapi DB):**
- ECS Fargate tasks (`paymentapi-svc-prod`) — connections via `paymentapi-db-prod` endpoint
- No other known consumers

## Signal envelopes (prod, last 30 days)

| Metric | Typical | Alert threshold | Notes |
|--------|---------|-----------------|-------|
| `ReadLatency` p99 | < 5ms | — | via Performance Insights |
| `DatabaseConnections` avg | ~50 | 80 (alarm) | Current `max_connections=100`; alarm fires frequently |
| `CPUUtilization` avg | < 40% | 80% | Headroom available |
| `FreeStorageSpace` | > 80 GB | — | Autoscaling enabled up to 500 GB |

> **Note:** The connections alarm (`threshold=80`) fires frequently against the current `max_connections=100` limit. Raising the limit to 200 and updating the threshold proportionally to 160 is the intended remediation.
